input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.5.3.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.5.3.2
            TITLE: technical inspectors may check the compliance of all tubes.  this may be done by ultrasonic

            CONTENT:
            rule F.5.3.2: Technical Inspectors may check the compliance of all tubes.  This may be done by ultrasonic
F.5.3.2 Technical Inspectors may check the compliance of all tubes.  This may be done by ultrasonic 
testing or by the drilling of inspection holes on request.

final_answer: Technical Inspectors may check the compliance of all tubes. This may be done by ultrasonic testing or by the drilling of inspection holes on request.
